headline: Teen investors have time on their side. Teaching them to avoid 'get rich quick' schemes is key, experts say.
summary: According to recent data from Charles Schwab, 7 in 10 teenagers ages 13-17 say they're very or extremely interested in investing and their parents are stepping up to teach them.
